Modules » Quadrature & Singularity Handling

Private Member Functions

dcmplx I1 (dcmplx grrp, RWGFun *fp)
 I1: integral of scalar kernel times RWG prefactor over the test triangle.
 
cvec I2 (dcmplx grrp, RWGFun *fp)
 I2: vector form with the RWG basis evaluated at the centroid.
 
cvec I4 (cvec grrp, RWGFun *fp)
 I4: vector kernel crossed with RWG at the centroid.
 

Detailed Description

template<class Type>
class GaussQuad< Type >

Gaussian-quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields.

Template Parameters
Typeeither a Green's function provider or an incident‑field class exposing the member functions described in the file header.
Note
The implementation uses centroid evaluation (first order) for the inner integrals I1, I2, I4, I5, which is consistent with the low‑order RWG discretization and the JOSA B Vol 26 No 4 2009 first‑order formulas referenced in the code comments below.

Definition at line 48 of file GaussQuad.h.

I1 with on‑the‑fly kernel evaluation at (r,rp) using gF.

Parameters
gFGreen's function object.
EvaluationFunctionPointer to scalar kernel member of gF.
rObservation point (usually centroid of the test triangle).
fpSource RWG living on the source triangle.
Returns
Complex scalar integral value.

◆ Integrate() [2/2]

template<class Type>
std::vector< dcmplx > GaussQuad< Type >::Integrate ( Type * gF,
std::vector< cvec >(Type::* EvaluationFunction )(rvec r),
RWGFun * f,
bool NeedsAccurate )

Integrate on triangle \( \{ \mathbf{E}^{inc}, \mathbf{H}^{inc} \} \) with Dunavant quadrature.

Parameters
gFIncident field provider.
EvaluationFunctionPointer to std::vector<cvec> Type::(rvec) that returns {E,H}.
fTest RWG function.
NeedsAccurateWhen true, use a higher‑order Dunavant rule (N5); otherwise N1.
Returns
Vector \( \{\iint \mathbf{f} \cdot \mathbf{E}^{inc} dS, \iint \mathbf{f} \cdot \mathbf{H}^{inc} dS \} \) in this order.

Definition at line 242 of file GaussQuad.h.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ IntegrateD()

template<class Type>
dcmplx GaussQuad< Type >::IntegrateD ( Type * gF,
dcmplx(Type::* EvaluationFunction )(rvec r, rvec rp),
RWGFun * f,
RWGFun * fp )

Two‑triangle integral for the D operator (Eq.

(27), JOSA B 26(4), 2009).

Parameters
gFGreen's function object.
EvaluationFunctionPointer to scalar kernel member of gF.
fObservation RWG living on the observation triangle.
fpSource RWG living on the source triangle.
Returns
Complex scalar value.

Uses first‑order centroid approximations of inner integrals and the wavenumber \( k \) provided by Type::WaveVec().

Definition at line 201 of file GaussQuad.h.

Here is the call graph for this function:

template<class Type>
dcmplx GaussQuad< Type >::IntegrateK ( Type * gF,
cvec(Type::* EvaluationFunction )(rvec r, rvec rp),
RWGFun * f,
RWGFun * fp )

Two‑triangle integral for the K operator (Eq.

(29), JOSA B 26(4), 2009).

Parameters
gFGreen's function object.
EvaluationFunctionPointer to scalar kernel member of gF.
fObservation RWG living on the observation triangle.
fpSource RWG living on the source triangle.
Returns
Complex scalar value.

Uses first‑order centroid approximations of inner integrals and the wavenumber \( k \) provided by Type::WaveVec().
